name: Christiani & Nielsen (Thai) Public Company Limited
summary: Christiani & Nielsen (Thai) Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides construction services for government and private sectors in Thailand and internationally. The company engages in the design and construction of building and civil engineering projects; and design, fabrication, and erection of steel structures, and mechanical and electrical installations. It also provides services for energy solutions in solar, wind, and other renewable energy sectors; and develops properties. The company was formerly known as Christiani & Nielsen (Siam) Ltd. and changed its name to Christiani & Nielsen (Thai) Public Company Limited in November 1992. The company was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Christiani & Nielsen (Thai) Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Globex Corporation Limited.
